reach_why: Extends familiar selection-bias critiques to ontology-changing machine explanations, but does not open wholly unprecedented territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links human legibility filters, grammatical screening, and loss of radical scientific novelty.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying evaluation filters and measuring whether unconventional but valid explanations are disproportionately rejected.
explanation: Human-style filtering may systematically discard transformative explanations that initially look like nonsense.
